summary: Beautiful soundboard capture of a solid 1992 show highlighted by a smoking Help>Slip>Franklins opener and a tight second set.
review: The recording is praised as a beautiful sound‑board source with generally clear audio, though some reviewers note the vocals are slightly distant. Musically the concert is regarded as a strong performance – Jerry’s post‑Brent ballads shine, Help>Slip>Franklins opens the night with fire, and the second set delivers standout moments like Casey Jones, Smokestack Lightning and an inspired New Speedway Boogie.

ai_rating.rationale: Most substantive reviews are highly positive about both the performance (standout songs, tight set) and the sound‑board recording quality; only minimal technical quibbles were noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a beautiful sound board with clear mix overall; some mention voices slightly distant in the mics. Track‑list errors are noted but do not affect audio quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opens with a fiery Help>Slip>Franklins sequence, maintains momentum through the first set, and delivers a solid second set despite some track‑order labeling errors.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His post‑Brent ballads shine; fine form throughout and delivers an especially strong New Speedway Boogie.
